name: post
description: Post text and images to Twitter and/or Farcaster. Use this for creating new posts, announcements, or status updates. Supports multi-account, auto-variation to avoid duplicate content detection, thread splitting, link shortening, and image uploads. Use reply for responding to existing posts instead.

twitter.description: Post to Twitter only (default: both platforms if not set)

farcaster.description: Post to Farcaster only (default: both platforms if not set)

account.description: Twitter account to use (lowercase prefix from .env credentials)

image.description: Path to image file to attach

vary.description: Auto-vary text to avoid duplicate content detection

thread.description: Split long text into numbered thread posts

shorten_links.description: Shorten URLs using TinyURL to save characters

truncate.description: Auto-truncate if message exceeds character limit

yes.description: Skip confirmation prompt and post immediately

name: reply
description: Reply to tweets on Twitter or casts on Farcaster. Use this for engaging with existing posts. For new posts, use post instead. Supports replying to both platforms simultaneously, image attachments, and link shortening.

twitter.description: Twitter tweet ID to reply to (get from URL: twitter.com/user/status/TWEET_ID)

farcaster.description: Farcaster cast hash to reply to (get from URL: farcaster.xyz/~/conversations/HASH)

account.description: Twitter account to use (lowercase prefix from .env credentials)

image.description: Path to image file to attach

shorten_links.description: Shorten URLs using TinyURL to save characters

truncate.description: Auto-truncate if reply exceeds character limit

yes.description: Skip confirmation prompt and reply immediately

name: check_balance
description: Check USDC balance in Farcaster custody wallet on Base chain. Use this to verify you have enough funds for Farcaster casts (each cast costs 0.001 USDC). For posting new content, use post instead.
